description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable-git image with a docker:dind service, defines MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS variables, sets up stages manual, build, push, and deploy, and caches the .m2/repository directory. In the build stage add a build-artifacts job that runs on the registry.gitlab.com/opentracing-workshop/build-mvn-jdk11:latest image, executes "mvn clean", then "mvn install -Dnet.bytebuddy.experimental=true", then "chmod a+x ./scripts/prepare.sh && ./scripts/prepare.sh", stores the target folder as an artifact, and runs on all branches except tags. In the deploy stage add deploy-dependencies and deploy-services jobs that both use the registry.gitlab.com/opentracing-workshop/build-tools:latest image, run "chmod a+x ./scripts/deploy_backend.sh && ./scripts/deploy_backend.sh" or "chmod a+x ./scripts/deploy_services.sh && ./scripts/deploy_services.sh" respectively, are manual, allowed to fail, run only on the master branch (excluding tags), and target the prod environment. In the push stage add a push-images job on the docker:stable-git image that installs bash with "apk add --no-cache bash", logs into the registry using "echo ${CI_BUILD_TOKEN} | docker login -u gitlab-ci-token --password-stdin ${CI_REGISTRY}", then runs "chmod a+x ./scripts/image_build.sh && ./scripts/image_build.sh", runs only on master (excluding tags), and has an empty cache. Finally, in the manual stage add a validate-k8s job using the registry.gitlab.com/opentracing-workshop/build-tools:latest image that runs "kubectl get pods" followed by "chmod a+x scripts/check_vars.sh && ./scripts/check_vars.sh", is manual, allowed to fail, runs on all branches except tags, and also targets the prod environment.
